results.author: cryptoalpha_sol
results.text: Solana breaking $220 resistance. Next target $250 if BTC holds $90k. The ecosystem growth is insane right now — Jito tips up 340% YoY, DEX volume hitting records. $SOL 🚀

results.author: solana_daily
results.text: Breaking: Solana TVL hits $12.8B — new all-time high. Raydium and Orca leading DEX volume. The L1 wars are over and Solana won the retail + DeFi category.

results.author: 0xtrader_eth
results.text: Sold my $ETH bags for $SOL. Controversial take but: Solana's user experience is 10x better. Sub-second finality, $0.001 fees, and now even the institutional crowd is showing up.
